reviewContext: Re-entry review after gap-hunting fix GAP-002. Page previously passed all three reviews. Only change: 7 Unicode en dashes (U+2013) converted to double-hyphen (--) on lines 68, 69, 70, 101, 102, 103, 104 per INV-style-096.

invariantResults.evidence: Zero Unicode en dashes (U+2013) remain on the page. All 7 conversions verified: lines 68, 69, 70 (User management list items) and lines 101-104 (Common system roles list items). All double-hyphens have proper spacing (space before and after). Line 103 correctly has two double-hyphens: '**Channel manager** -- manages...' and 'channel owners -- they can...' — one converted, one pre-existing.

Page predominantly uses active voice. Three instances of passive voice detected (lines 27, 47, 69) are acceptable: 'is released' is part of a compound sentence starting with active voice; 'are managed' occurs in link description text; 'is handled' is in a list item description. All are pre-existing and contextually appropriate.
Filename 'security-guidelines.md' follows lowercase hyphenated convention matching page title 'Security guidelines'.
Page title 'Security guidelines' does not end with '-ing'.

additionalFindings.evidence: Headings follow correct hierarchy: h2 (7 sections) → h3 (7 subsections) → h4 (3 sub-subsections). No levels skipped. Verified: h4 'Application permissions', 'Data permissions', 'Custom permissions' all under h3 'Permissions' under h2 'Roles and permissions'.
Bullet lists in User management (lines 68-70) and Common system roles (lines 101-104) follow identical pattern: '- [link/bold term] -- description.' Consistent throughout.
All internal links use Liquid tags (page_link, inpage_link, external_link). No bare markdown links. Consistent format throughout.
Prose is clear, concise, and scannable. Sentences are well-structured with appropriate length for a reference overview page.

Checked against ANTI-002 (dash type confusion): no en dashes or em dashes remain; all dashes are properly formatted double-hyphens. No other anti-patterns detected (no code blocks for ANTI-010, no API methods for ANTI-004, etc.).

Checked STYLE-004 from knowledge-brief (page_link identifier fabrication): all 32 page_link identifiers appear to be actual values (mix of human-readable and hash-based IDs). No fabricated identifiers detected.

summary.focusAreaVerification: INV-style-096 PASS: All 7 Unicode en dashes successfully converted to double-hyphens. Zero en dashes remain. Line 103 dual-dash handling correct. All double-hyphens properly spaced.
